name: 140 E Chatham St
about: The Albatross is a golf simulator venue located in downtown Raleigh. It offers a golf simulator experience with food and drinks in a relaxed environment. The venue is designed for both casual play and serious golf practice, catering to a diverse clientele looking for an engaging indoor golf experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Combines golf simulation with food and drinks for a complete social experience
Offers a relaxed atmosphere suitable for both casual and serious golfers
Provides an indoor golf experience regardless of weather conditions
Caters to various group sizes from solo practice to corporate events

food_and_drink.notes: Food service available with a menu focused on bar snacks and casual dining
Full bar service with cocktails and other beverages

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or use the clubs provided at the venue.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not allowed as the venue has its own kitchen and bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, 18 holes take about 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue is primarily aimed at adults and may not have specific amenities for children.
